parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auxiliary.relatorio_cc (
  "ID", "ID_SEED", "ID_CC", "CC", "CC_LABEL",
  "VENCIMENTO", "FORNECEDOR", "NOME_DESPESA",
  "SITUACAO", "DATA_PAGAMENTO", "CATEGORIA",
  "VALOR", "TYPE", created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.record.ID }}, {{ $json.record.ID_SEED }}, {{ $json.cc_id }},
  'NO-SET',
  {{ $json.cc_label }},
  to_timestamp({{ $json.record.VENCIMENTO }}::bigint),
  {{ $json.record.FORNECEDOR }}, {{ $json.record.NOME_DESPESA }}, {{ $json.record.SITUACAO }}, {{ $json.record.DATA_PAGAMENTO }}, {{ $json.record.CATEGORIA }},
  {{ $json.record.VALOR }}::numeric,
  {{ $json.type }},
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo',
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'
)
ON CONFLICT ("ID") DO NOTHING;

UPDATE auxiliary.update_cc_report_status
SET
  entries_runned = CASE WHEN {{ $json.type }} = 'entrada' THEN 1 ELSE entries_runned END,
  outputs_runned = CASE WHEN {{ $json.type }} = 'saida'   THEN 1 ELSE outputs_runned END,
  updated_at     = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE cc_id = {{ $json.cc_id }};
